---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability, assertion, target, or binding
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / use case

What are you trying to do that asm-test doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like — e.g. a new assertion, calling convention, target arch/OS, or
language binding. Sketch the API if you have one in mind.

## Scope

- Does this touch the native tier, the emulator tier, or a binding?
- Portability: does it need to work across x86-64 + AArch64 and Linux + macOS?

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed, and why this one. See [DESIGN.md](../../DESIGN.md)
for the existing design and roadmap.
